news.title: ASX treads water after mixed US session; WiseTech extends its fall
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket went sideways in lunchtime trade after oil bounced back from losses overnight, while Wall Street was weighed down by tech giants.

news.title: Midas touch reveals Larvotto gold-antimony target in NSW
news.snippet: Larvotto has outlined a 656,000-ounce gold-equivalent target at Midas in NSW, adding an accessible growth front to its Hillgrove project as the company nears production.

news.title: Gateway silver halo points to deeper WA gold prize
news.snippet: Gateway Mining has confirmed a large gold-silver system at Great Western in WA, with a high-grade silver halo hinting at a deeper gold source ahead of RC drilling.

news.title: ‘The public will become very rich’: Should governments take a cut of the AI boom?
news.snippet: In Trump’s America, there are calls for the government to buy or get gifted shares in the AI giants to give the public a stake in the disruption they create.

news.title: Manhattan fires up first drill blitz at Canadian gold play in 30 years
news.snippet: Manhattan Gold has launched a 4000m drill campaign at its Hook Lake project in Canada, marking the first modern exploration at the site in more than three decades.

news.title: Dalaroo gears up for expanded Greenland rare earths assault
news.snippet: Dalaroo Metals has launched its biggest Greenland campaign yet, testing whether a 2.7km critical minerals discovery extends offshore and grows into a much bigger opportunity.

news.title: Critical Resources lights up NZ tungsten target with 16.6% hit
news.snippet: Critical Resources has hit a stunning 16.63 per cent tungsten trioxide in a channel sample at its Granite Creek project in New Zealand, confirming a high-grade system.

news.title: ‘Necessary and immediate’: KPMG chair to resign after damning hearing
news.snippet: The KPMG scandal has claimed another three scalps with its chairman among the latest to accept accountability for the misuse of confidential customer information.
